case_title: MUSLEM, JEANARETTA GUARD. AD LITEM-KHALENA MUSLEM VS KONO, KIMBERLY et al

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL TO KIMBERLY KONO RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUSLEM, JEANARETTA GUARD. AD LITEM-KHALENA MUSLEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KONO, KIMBERLY KONO, JOY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,570.00, THE GUARDIAN AD LITEM IS ORDERED TO HOLD THIS AWARD IN A BLOCKED BANK ACCOUNT TO BE WITHDRAWN WHEN THE MINOR BECOMES 18 YRS OLD; OR UNTIL FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUSLEM, JEANARETTA GUARD. AD LITEM-KHALENA MUSLEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KONO, KIMBERLY KONO, JOY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,570.00, COURT ORDERS THE PROVISION CONCERNING THE BLOCKED ACCOUNT BE REMOVED.
